problem: Why can salamanders regenerate limbs but humans cannot — what gene pathway?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: If Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
